title: Boat Addons
description:
A datapack created by an amateur datapacker and a crazy person. ⛵
(DISCLAIMER: No actual boats are included in Boat Addons)
body:
![BOAT ADDONS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfad39265167e2a49ce96da413dc3587a8deb3a1_0.webp)

# ACACIA
- Teleport there using `/trigger acacia`. Teleport back to the Overworld using `/trigger overworld`.
- You will get the advancement [its so pretty!!]
- It's a dimension of only biomes that generate acacia wood.
- There are structures called Granny Mobiles that generate in those biomes, so they also generate in this dimension.

# BARBIE
- Teleport there using `/trigger barbie`. Teleport back to the Overworld using `/trigger overworld`.
- You will get the advancement [MY EYES]
- It's a dimension of biomes we made, the Barbie Grove and the Barbie Forest. They are super pink.
- There are structures called HDGaming Heads and Barbie Fountains. The HDGaming Heads have trash ores in them and what I, the one writing this, am always thinking about (My IGN is HDGaming). The Barbie Fountains are tall fountains made of iron blocks. There's also Loot Chests which generate with some iron ingots.

# SUPER OP!!111!!!!ONE!!
- A new enchantment that is super OP!
- Put it on your shovel!!!
- Promise!! ✋😀💯

# MENDING II COARSE DIRT
- A recipe that utilizes Acacia Boats from the Acacia, Pink Petals from the Barbie, and a Goat Horn because it rhymes with boat.
- It makes 2 Coarse Dirt with Mending II.

# DIMENSION SWITCHER
- Instead of using `/trigger`, an alternative is opening the in-game menu and clicking "Dimension Switcher" to switch between dimensions.

## NOTES
- Always make sure to have a water bucket and pickaxe with you when using the commands/dialog to teleport to the different dimensions, because it teleports you to the coordinates X0 Y100 Z0 in the respective dimensions, so water bucket clutching to break your fall or a pickaxe if you get teleported in a wall are kind of needed.
- Release version 1.0 had a copyright violation, that's why release 1.0.1 is the oldest version.
